news.paragraph: Broadcom is experiencing momentum as a key player in custom AI silicon and is currently cited as a top semiconductor pick by Citi. Traders should closely monitor the upcoming earnings report, which acts as a significant imminent catalyst for the stock. Recent headlines also note insider buying and positive sentiment regarding the company's AI infrastructure role.
